generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor responsible for horizontal movement of the gantry crane, controlled via TMC4671-Eval motor driver for precise positioning."
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor responsible for vertical movement of the crane's hoist, controlled via TMC4671-Eval motor driver for precise lifting operations."
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic device mounted at the end of the hoist for picking up and dropping container pucks, integrated with the Arduino control system."
]

instance ArduinoControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based central controller integrating sensor inputs (swing angle encoder, anemometer) and motor controllers (TMC4671-Eval) for real-time crane operation."
]

instance PythonControlApplication : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Python-based application interfacing with Arduino control system to coordinate motor drivers and implement control algorithms for crane operation."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Optical encoder measuring the swinging motion of the crane's hoist to enable swing compensation in trajectory planning."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wind speed sensor providing real-time environmental data for stability analysis and trajectory adjustment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance ArduinoSensorHub : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Central Arduino board aggregating sensor data (swing angle, wind speed) and generating control signals for motor drivers."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorAggregatedData
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SensorAggregatedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensorHub
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensorHub
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD representation of the gantry crane created in Fusion360, used for visualization and kinematic analysis in the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical representation of crane motion parameters (joint angles, velocities) used by the TrajectoryGeneratorService for optimal path planning."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLib
]

instance ControllerInLoopSimulator : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Python-based controller-in-the-loop simulator replicating physical crane behavior for offline validation and testing."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLib
]

instance HistoricalTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing crane state trajectories, environmental conditions, and operational parameters in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance ArcadiaHarborModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MBSE representation created in Arcadia/Capella documenting system architecture and operational scenarios for teaching purposes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLib
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based time-series database storing historical crane state data and trajectory records for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ValidationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization platform displaying crane trajectories, environmental conditions, and operational alerts."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating asynchronous communication between physical crane and digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryExecutionService
]

instance PythonGantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Python library containing kinematic algorithms and control logic for crane operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance DockerCompose : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Container orchestration tool managing deployment of database, dashboard, and MQTT broker services in isolated logical containers."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinContainerization
]

// C6: Services
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous data collection service recording crane state parameters (positions, angles, wind speed) in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service displaying crane trajectories with confidence bounds from simulation models in Grafana dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualizationAction
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Kinematics-based service computing optimal trajectories that minimize residual swinging motion using the kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service comparing executed trajectories against simulated trajectories using distance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Controller-in-the-loop simulator replicating physical crane behavior for offline testing and validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service coordinating trajectory execution between physical crane and digital twin via MQTT broker for real-time adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:provides ExecutionControlAction
]

instance TeachingExtensionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing educational extensions including harbor simulations and Capella models for academic teaching."
    DTDFVocab:provides TeachingMaterialInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance CraneStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time state data of the crane including motor positions, swing angles, and environmental conditions."
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Graphical representation of crane trajectories with simulation confidence bounds displayed in Grafana dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Mathematically optimized trajectories that minimize swinging motion and energy consumption based on kinematic analysis."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series classification results identifying potential faults (motor misalignment, wind instability) based on historical data patterns."
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation metrics comparing physical execution against simulated behavior to assess model fidelity and control performance."
]

instance ExecutionControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time control adjustments sent to physical crane via MQTT broker based on trajectory validation results."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TeachingMaterialInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Educational resources including harbor simulation models and Capella architecture diagrams for academic teaching purposes."
]

// C1: Environment
instance HarborCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical and virtual environment encompassing the lab-scale gantry crane system and its digital twin components."
    base:contains PhysicalCraneSystem, DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance PhysicalCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment containing the gantry crane with all acting and sensing components."
    base:contains CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, ArduinoControlSystem, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment containing all digital twin services, models, and data storage components."
    base:contains TimescaleDB, GrafanaDashboard, MQTTBroker, PythonGantryLib, DockerCompose
]

// C5: Components
instance TMC4671MotorDriver : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Trinamic TMC4671-Eval evaluation board providing stepper motor control for both cart and hoist motors with precise positioning capabilities."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalCraneSystem
]

instance ArduinoKiCadShield : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom KiCad-designed shield for Arduino integrating sensor interfaces and motor control outputs."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalCraneSystem
]

instance GantryLibModule : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python module containing core kinematic algorithms and control logic specifically developed for the gantry crane system."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance DigitalTwinContainerization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Logical containerization framework using Docker Compose to deploy digital twin services in isolated Python environments."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction is facilitated through **optimized control signals** and **simulation-based feedback**:
  - **Trajectory Generation Service** computes optimal movement trajectories (e.g., swing-free paths) using a **kinematic model** of the crane and sends commands to the **Control Application**.
  - **Simulation Service** generates synthetic trajectories for comparison with real-world execution, enabling **continuous validation**.
  - **Dashboard notifications** (via Grafana) alert operators if deviations exceed predefined thresholds, triggering manual adjustments.
  The interaction is mediated by the **MQTT broker** for real-time signaling and the **Physical Crane Interface** for command execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates at **millisecond to second time scales**, synchronized with the physical system:
  - **Real-time data logging** occurs at **high-frequency intervals** (e.g., 10–100 Hz for motor positions) to capture dynamic behavior.
  - **Trajectory validation** compares real-time execution with simulated trajectories at **sub-second intervals** for fault detection.
  - **Dashboard updates** occur at **low-frequency intervals** (e.g., 1–10 Hz) for operator monitoring.
  The twin’s services are designed for **online operation**, with minimal latency (<100 ms) for control loop feedback."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is organized as follows:
  - **Physical Side**: Comprises the **gantry crane**, **Arduino controller**, and **motor drivers** (centralized hardware).
  - **Digital Side**: Six **logical services** (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) deployed as **Python modules** and **Docker containers** (for database/dashboard/MQTT).
  - **Interaction Layers**:
    1. **Physical Crane Interface** (Python) bridges hardware and digital twin.
    2. **MQTT Broker** enables asynchronous communication between services.
    3. **TimescaleDB** acts as the central data repository.
    4. **Grafana Dashboard** provides visualization and operator alerts.
  The constellation follows a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with loose coupling between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the **as-operated** lifecycle stage of the physical system, focusing on **runtime monitoring, validation, and optimization**. It does not model the **as-designed** (CAD) or **as-manufactured** phases explicitly, though CAD models (Fusion360) and Arcadia/Capella models are available for **systems engineering documentation**. The twin’s primary role is **operational twinning**, enabling real-time adjustments and fault detection during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Continuous Validation**: Real-time comparison of **executed trajectories** (from PT) with **simulated trajectories** (from DT) using **distance metrics**. Deviations exceeding thresholds trigger alerts.
  - **Model Validation**: Reuse of **existing model validation techniques** (e.g., [5]) to assess kinematic model accuracy.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Simulation confidence bounds (upper/lower bounds) visualized in Grafana to quantify prediction errors.
  - **Verification**: Unit tests for Python modules (e.g., trajectory generator) and **historical data logging** for post-hoc analysis.
  The twin’s validity is **operationally validated** via real-world crane performance and **research-validated** through publications ([4], [5], [6])."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT uses:
  - **Data Protocols**:
    - **MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto)** for asynchronous messaging between services (e.g., control commands, sensor data).
    - **SQL (PostgreSQL-compatible)** for TimescaleDB data storage and querying.
  - **Network Architecture**:
    - **Local network** (Ethernet/Wi-Fi) for communication between Arduino, Python services, and Docker containers.
    - **Bidirectional data flow**: PT → DT via **sensor data logging** and **event triggers**; DT → PT via **optimized control signals**.
  - **Latency**: Designed for **low-latency (<100 ms)** operation to support real-time control loops."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Deployment**: All software runs on a **personal computer** (no cloud dependency).
  - **Containerization**: **Docker Compose** manages the **database (TimescaleDB)**, **MQTT broker**, and **Grafana dashboard** as containers.
  - **Python Services**: **gantrylib** module (Python) hosts all other services (logging, trajectory generation, simulation, validation).
  - **Hardware Dependency**: Requires **Arduino** for sensor/control integration but can be **emulated** for testing (as in related work exemplars).
  The deployment is **self-contained**, with a single command (`docker compose up`) to initialize the digital twin infrastructure."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The digital twin supports **limited horizontal integration**:
  - **Harbor System Extension**: Expanded for teaching purposes to include **container identification systems** and **ship digital twins** (e.g., buoyancy models) ([BIP 2024-2025]).
  - **Sensor Data Integration**: Wind speed (anemometer) and swing angles feed into **environmental modeling** for trajectory planning.
  - **No Standardized APIs**: Integration with external systems (e.g., ERP, logistics platforms) is **not implemented** but could be added via MQTT or REST endpoints.
  The current design prioritizes **vertical integration** (PT ↔ DT) over horizontal connectivity."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are governed by:
  - **MIT License**: The entire exemplar (code, documentation, models) is **open-source**, with no restrictions on data reuse.
  - **Data Ownership**: The **physical system owner** (e.g., university lab) retains ownership of logged data, though the **digital twin services** are publicly accessible.
  - **Privacy**: No sensitive data (e.g., user identities, proprietary logs) is stored; data is **anonymized** for research/teaching purposes.
  The exemplar does not address **commercial data ownership** or **GDPR compliance**, as it is intended for **academic/research use only**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards and conventions:
  - **Modeling**: Uses **Autodesk Fusion360** for CAD and **Capella/Arcadia** for MBSE (Model-Based Systems Engineering).
  - **Data Formats**: **TimescaleDB** (PostgreSQL-compatible) for time-series data; **MQTT** for messaging (broker-independent).
  - **No Proprietary Frameworks**: Avoids commercial digital twin frameworks (e.g., Eclipse Ditto, BaSyx) in favor of **open-source, ad-hoc integration**.
  - **Documentation**: Follows **C4 Model** for architecture visualization and **MkDocs** for technical documentation.
  The exemplar does not enforce **industry-wide standards** (e.g., OPC UA, AutomationML) but aligns with **academic research practices**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **No Remote Operation**: The digital twin **does not execute remote commands** on the physical crane; all actions require **operator confirmation** via the Human Machine Interface (HMI).
  - **Localized Security**: The system relies on **local network access** (no cloud exposure) and **open-source tools** (e.g., Mosquitto, TimescaleDB) with default security configurations.
  - **Safety Mechanisms**:
    - **Threshold-based alerts** (e.g., trajectory deviation) prevent unsafe operations.
    - **Manual override** via HMI for critical adjustments.
  - **Limitations**:
    - **No encryption** for MQTT or database communications (assumes trusted local network).
    - **No formal cybersecurity audits**; security is assumed to be sufficient for **academic/research environments**.
  The exemplar prioritizes **operational safety** over **cybersecurity hardening**, aligning with its **educational/research focus**."
]
